title: 4 Pack Christmas Bows 40 x 25 cm Large Christmas Tree Bows Xmas Holiday Decorations Red Bows for Wreaths, Door and Windows
features: Christmas Bows: Our Christmas bows are crafted from high-quality materials, each with a velvety texture that adds a touch of elegance to your festive decorations, making them stand out in any Christmas themed display.

Festive Decor: Our large Christmas tree bow, measuring 25x45 cm, is the perfect addition to your holiday decorations. With its traditional Christmas colors, it adds a touch of charm to your festive setup.

Versatile Usage: Ideal for both indoor and outdoor settings, our Christmas bow is a versatile choice. Whether you want to decorate your Christmas tree, front door, wreaths, shrubs, windows, or outdoor fences, our bow is the perfect option.

Easy to Use: Our Christmas bow features a hard thread on the back, making it easy to tie and secure onto wreaths, trees, and more. Hanging them up is a breeze, and you can even involve your kids in the decoration process.

Quantity: Each pack includes 4 large red Christmas bows, adding a beautiful touch to your Xmas tree and providing visual appeal for both home decorating and outdoor displays throughout the holiday season.
description: Size: 25x45 cm /9.84 x 17.7 inches Quantity: 4 red christmas bows Material: velvet + PVC backed Note: Avoid ironing the bows. If wrinkles occur during transportation, you can gently flatten them with a weight or by hand. The large Christmas bows are perfect for tying onto wreaths, windows, doors, walls, stairs, fences, chair, and trees, and their size is suitable for outdoor displays as well.
